name: Sweet and Sour Pork Ribs
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the pork ribs by cutting them into serving pieces.
2. In a large bowl, mix the sweet and sour sauce with the pork ribs.
3. Coat the ribs evenly with the sauce mixture.
4. Place the coated ribs in an oven-safe dish.
5. Cover the dish with aluminum foil.
6. Bake the ribs at 375°F (190°C) for about 1 hour or until tender.
7. Remove the ribs from the oven and let them cool slightly before serving.
